title: Philibertella elegans
taxonomy: Philibertella elegans is a species of lichenized fungus in the family Graphidaceae. The kingdom to which Philibertella elegans belongs is Fungi. As a member of the Graphidaceae family, it falls under the order Ostropales. Philibertella elegans is further classified under the class Lecanoromycetes. This classification places Philibertella elegans in the phylum Ascomycota.
